#  View the Distribution History of a Custom RFI Report 
##  Things to Consider 
  * [Required User Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/rfi-project/permissions)


##  Demo 
![Rfi Report Distribution History](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/ab3b470a0b631eea099ecad841451cbe/8f573c6c3c1705360cbd31e3a31e3c50/rfi-report-distribution-history.gif?fm=webp)
##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to your project's **RFIs** tool.
  2. In the right pane, click the desired report
  3. Under **General Report Links** , click **Distribution History**. 


## See Also
  * [RFIs - Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/rfi-project/permissions)
  * [Share a Custom RFI Report](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/rfi-project/tutorials/share-a-custom-rfi-report)
  * [Configure Advanced Settings: RFIs](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/rfi-project/tutorials/configure-advanced-settings-rfis)
title: View the Distribution History of a Custom RFI Report
description: How to view the report distribution history for a report listed in the RFIs tool.
